/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/test_portable_types.dir/portable_types.cpp.o  -o /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/ecl_config/test_portable_types   -L/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/build/gtest:/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/build/gtest/lib ../../../../../gtest/lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
